human_explanation: A person is riding a bicycle in a pedestrian-only area where cycling is not allowed.

segments.ai_explanation: The anomaly is due to the presence of a cyclist riding through what appears to be a pedestrian-only area, deviating from the learned pattern of normal pedestrian behavior in this scene.

scores.justification: The AI accurately identifies the anomaly as a cyclist in a pedestrian-only area, matching the human explanation. It provides a specific description of the scene, though it could mention more details like the specific rules about cycling. The explanation captures all the essential points and is clearly written.
